candidates.cluster_label: Samsung HI — 1 LNG carrier — undisclosed Bermuda owner
candidates.discovery_notes: Samsung HI disclosed on 27-May-2026 a five-vessel order (1 LNG carrier + 2 VLGCs + 2 crude tankers) from an unidentified Bermuda-based shipowner; only the 1 LNG carrier is in scope. ~$252M (381.4bn won), delivery Oct-2028. Owner name not disclosed; brokers link it to JP Morgan interests (UNCONFIRMED) -> yellow. Net-new confirmed by reconciliation: Samsung YTD 13 LNG incl 1 FSRU = backend 12 + this 1; and Samsung's 6 May-2026 vessels (1 FSRU + 5 LNG) all already in backend, so the 27-May ship is the only addition. Capacity not disclosed (left blank).

row_data.Shipowner: Undisclosed (Bermuda-based; brokers link to JP Morgan, unconfirmed)

candidates.cluster_label: Hanwha Ocean — 1 LNG carrier — Knutsen OAS (9th ship)
candidates.discovery_notes: Knutsen OAS Shipping exercised an option for its 9th LNG carrier at Hanwha Ocean, announced 29-May-2026: 174,000 cbm, 375.9bn won (~$250M), delivery by Sep-2029. DISTINCT from Knutsen's earlier 08-May order already in backend (row 1205; 363.2bn won, delivery Jun-2029) — Rule E cluster-split on contract date + price + delivery. Count reconciliation: Knutsen's Hanwha orderbook now 9 (7 in Dec-2025 + 1 mid-May + this one). iMarine 35664 carries every value verbatim and is non-paywalled.

candidates.cluster_label: Jiangnan — COSCO Shipping Energy 4x LNG (Shell charter) — vessel 1/4
candidates.discovery_notes: COSCO Shipping Energy (via Cosco Shipping LNG Investment Shanghai / CSET) ordered 4x 175,000 cbm LNG carriers at Jiangnan, announced ~02-Jun-2026, on a 7-year charter to Shell (Shell Tankers Singapore). 6.445bn yuan ($953M total, ~$238M/ship), delivery 2029-2030. DISTINCT from the 30-Jan Shandong Ocean Energy/Minsheng quartet already in backend (rows 1158-1161, delivery 2028-29). VERIFICATION CAVEAT: COSCO+Shell+LNG-quartet+on-order are in LNG Prime 188357's publicly-visible title/lead; the yard (Jiangnan), capacity, price and delivery passed the curl content-check but sit in LNG Prime's paywalled body. Corroborating Splash247 + Seatrade returned HTTP 403 in this environment (kept per SOP 3.8a). Recommend a browser spot-check before promoting -> yellow.

provenance_log.cluster_label: Jiangnan — COSCO Shipping Energy 4x LNG, Shell charter (~02-Jun-2026)
provenance_log.notes: LNG Prime 188357 (pub 02-Jun-2026) visible title/lead confirm COSCO Shipping Energy (CSET) + Shell + LNG-carrier quartet + 'entered into shipbuilding contracts'. The curl content-check also found 'Jiangnan','175,000','953','238','2029','2030' in the fetched page, but these sit in the paywalled body; Splash247 + Seatrade (which carry the same facts publicly) are HTTP 403 in this environment (kept per 3.8a). Distinct from the 30-Jan Shandong/Minsheng Jiangnan quartet already in backend (rows 1158-1161). Yellow pending a browser spot-check of the body values.

backend_status_flags.details: Backend records the Seapeak x3 (Samsung HI, Woodside-chartered) contract date as 01-May-2026. Samsung HI's regulatory disclosure of three 'Oceania' LNG carriers (1.1242tn won), which corresponds to this Seapeak trio, was dated 18-May-2026 (Samsung IR / IndexBox / Cyprus 2026-05-20). The 18-May 'three LNG carriers from Oceania' filing is NOT a new order — it is these same three Seapeak ships (Samsung's May 2026 book = 6 vessels = 1 FSRU + 5 LNG, all already in backend).
backend_status_flags.suggested_action: Confirm whether 01-May (LOI/announcement) or 18-May (firm-contract disclosure) is the intended Contract date for rows 1209-1211; no new vessel implied.
